lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਪਰਮਾਰਥੁ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਮਨੁ ਖਚਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad paaeeai paramaarath satasangat setee man khachanaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the greatest thing is obtained, and the mind is involved with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਆ ਖੇਲੁ ਬਡ ਮੇਲੁ ਤਮਾਸਾ ਵਾਹਗੁਰੂ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਭ ਰਚਨਾ ॥੩॥੧੩॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: keea khel badd mel tamaasaa vaahaguroo teree sabh rachanaa |3|13|42|
lines.english: You have formed and created this play, this great game. O Waahay Guru, this is all Your making. ||3||13||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮੁ ਅਨੰਤੁ ਅਨਾਦਿ ਆਦਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: agam anant anaad aad jis koe na jaanai |
lines.english: The Lord is Inaccessible, Infinite, Eternal and Primordial; no one knows His beginning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਦੂਸਰ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: nirankaar niravair avar nahee doosar koee |
lines.english: The Lord is Formless, beyond hate and vengeance; there is no one else like Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਵ ਬਿਰੰਚਿ ਧਰਿ ਧੵਾਨੁ ਨਿਤਹਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਬੇਦੁ ਬਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: siv biranch dhar dhayaan niteh jis bed bakhaanai |
lines.english: Shiva and Brahma meditate on Him; the Vedas describe Him again and again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੰਜਨ ਗੜ੍ਹਣ ਸਮਥੁ ਤਰਣ ਤਾਰਣ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhanjan garrhan samath taran taaran prabh soee |
lines.english: He creates and destroys - He is All-powerful; God is the Boat to carry all across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਾ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਗੁ ਕੀਓ ਜਨੁ ਮਥੁਰਾ ਰਸਨਾ ਰਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: naanaa prakaar jin jag keeo jan mathuraa rasanaa rasai |
lines.english: He created the world in its various aspects; His humble servant Mat'huraa delights in His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਗਹਿ ਕਰੀਆ ਧ੍ਰੁਵ ਬੁਧਿ ਸੁਮਤਿ ਸਮ੍ਹਾਰਨ ਕਉ ॥
lines.translit: guroo samarath geh kareea dhruv budh sumat samhaaran kau |
lines.english: I have grasped hold of the All-powerful Guru; He has made my mind steady and stable, and embellished me with clear consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਚਿਤਹ ਬਸੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sree sat naam karataa purakh gur raamadaas chitah basai |1|
lines.english: Sat Naam, the Great and Supreme True Name of God, the Personification of Creativity, dwells in the Consciousness of Guru Raam Daas. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਿ ਧ੍ਰੰਮ ਧੁਜਾ ਫਹਰੰਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਅਘ ਪੁੰਜ ਤਰੰਗ ਨਿਵਾਰਨ ਕਉ ॥
lines.translit: fun dhram dhujaa faharant sadaa agh punj tarang nivaaran kau |
lines.english: And, His Banner of Righteousness waves proudly forever, to defend against the waves of sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਬਡੌ ਕਲਿ ਮੈ ਭਵ ਸਾਗਰ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਨ ਕਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har naam bohith baddau kal mai bhav saagar paar utaaran kau |2|
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the Lord's Name is the Great Ship, to carry us all across the terrifying world-ocean, safely to the other side. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਥੁਰਾ ਜਨ ਜਾਨਿ ਕਹੀ ਜੀਅ ਸਾਚੁ ਸੁ ਅਉਰ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਬਿਚਾਰਨ ਕਉ ॥
lines.translit: mathuraa jan jaan kahee jeea saach su aaur kachhoo na bichaaran kau |
lines.english: His humble servant Mat'hraa knows this as true, and speaks it from his soul; there is nothing else to consider.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਤ ਹੀ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸੰਗ ਸੁਰੰਗ ਰਤੇ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਤ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: santat hee satasangat sang surang rate jas gaavat hai |
lines.english: The Saints dwell in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; imbued with pure celestial love, they sing the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਥੁਰਾ ਭਨਿ ਭਾਗ ਭਲੇ ਉਨੑ ਕੇ ਮਨ ਇਛਤ ਹੀ ਫਲ ਪਾਵਤ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: mathuraa bhan bhaag bhale una ke man ichhat hee fal paavat hai |
lines.english: So speaks Mat'huraa: those blessed with good fortune receive the fruits of their minds' desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਮ ਪੰਥੁ ਧਰਿਓ ਧਰਨੀਧਰ ਆਪਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਧਾਰਿ ਨ ਧਾਵਤ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: dhram panth dhario dharaneedhar aap rahe liv dhaar na dhaavat hai |
lines.english: The Support of the Earth has established this Path of Dharma; He Himself remains lovingly attuned to the Lord, and does not wander in distraction.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਕੇ ਸੁਤ ਕੋ ਤਿਨੑ ਤ੍ਰਾਸੁ ਕਹਾ ਜੁ ਚਰੰਨ ਗੁਰੂ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਤ ਹੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: rav ke sut ko tina traas kahaa ju charan guroo chit laavat hai |3|
lines.english: Those who focus their consciousness on the Guru's Feet, they do not fear the judgement of Dharamraj. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੁ ਅਥਾਹ ਅਤਿ ਬਡ ਸੁਭਰੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਰਤਨਾਗਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gahir ganbheer athaah at badd subhar sadaa sabh bidh ratanaagar |
lines.english: He is Deep and Profound, Unfathomable and utterly Great, eternally overflowing with all sorts of jewels.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਧਾ ਪਰਪੂਰਨ ਸਬਦ ਤਰੰਗ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿਤ ਦਿਨ ਆਗਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: niramal naam sudhaa parapooran sabad tarang pragattit din aagar |
lines.english: The Immaculate, Sacred Pool of the Guru is overflowing with the waves of the Shabad, radiantly revealed in the early hours before the dawn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਮਰਾਲ ਕਰਹਿ ਕੰਤੂਹਲ ਤਿਨ ਜਮ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਮਿਟਿਓ ਦੁਖ ਕਾਗਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sant maraal kareh kantoohal tin jam traas mittio dukh kaagar |
lines.english: The Saint-swans celebrate; their fear of death is erased, along with the accounts of their pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਮੁਨਿ ਧੵਾਨੁ ਧਰੈ ਫਿਰਤ ਸਗਲ ਜੁਗ ਕਬਹੁ ਕ ਕੋਊ ਪਾਵੈ ਆਤਮ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸ ਕਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau mun dhayaan dharai firat sagal jug kabahu k koaoo paavai aatam pragaas kau |
lines.english: For His Sake, the silent sages meditated and focused their consciousness, wandering all the ages through; rarely, if ever, their souls were enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਜੁਗ ਦੁਰਤ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਬੇ ਕਉ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਗਲ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kalajug durat door karabe kau darasan guroo sagal sukh saagar |4|
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the sins are taken away; the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan is the Ocean of all peace and comfort. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਹਿਤ ਬਿਰੰਚਿ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਸਿਵ ਮੁਨਿ ਗਹਿ ਨ ਤਜਾਤ ਕਬਿਲਾਸ ਕੰਉ ॥
lines.translit: bed baanee sahit biranch jas gaavai jaa ko siv mun geh na tajaat kabilaas knau |
lines.english: In the Hymns of the Vedas, Brahma sang His Praises; for His Sake, Shiva the silent sage held his place on the Kailaash Mountain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੌ ਜੋਗੀ ਜਤੀ ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਅਨੇਕ ਤਪ ਜਟਾ ਜੂਟ ਭੇਖ ਕੀਏ ਫਿਰਤ ਉਦਾਸ ਕਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau jogee jatee sidh saadhik anek tap jattaa joott bhekh kee firat udaas kau |
lines.english: For His Sake, the Yogis, celibates, Siddhas and seekers, the countless sects of fanatics with matted hair wear religious robes, wandering as detached renunciates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸੁਖ ਭਾਇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਜੀਅ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਬਡਾਈ ਦਈ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਕਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: su tin satigur sukh bhaae kripaa dhaaree jeea naam kee baddaaee dee gur raamadaas kau |5|
lines.english: That True Guru, by the Pleasure of His Will, showered His Mercy upon all beings, and blessed Guru Raam Daas with the Glorious Greatness of the Naam. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਧਿਆਨ ਅੰਤਰਗਤਿ ਤੇਜ ਪੁੰਜ ਤਿਹੁ ਲੋਗ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan dhiaan antaragat tej punj tihu log pragaase |
lines.english: He focuses His Meditation deep within; the Embodiment of Light, He illuminates the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਸਿਖ ਸਦਾ ਅਤਿ ਲੁਭਿਤ ਅਲਿ ਸਮੂਹ ਜਿਉ ਕੁਸਮ ਸੁਬਾਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: sevak sikh sadaa at lubhit al samooh jiau kusam subaase |
lines.english: The selfless servants and Sikhs are always totally captivated by it, like bumble bees lured by the fragrance of the flower.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਤ ਦਰਸੁ ਭਟਕਿ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਜਤ ਦੁਖ ਪਰਹਰਿ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਬਿਗਾਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: dekhat daras bhattak bhram bhajat dukh parahar sukh sehaj bigaase |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, doubt runs away, pain is eradicated, and celestial peace spontaneously wells up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਦੵਮਾਨ ਗੁਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਥਪੵਉ ਥਿਰੁ ਸਾਚਉ ਤਖਤੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਰਾਮਦਾਸੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bidayamaan gur aap thapyau thir saachau takhat guroo raamadaasai |6|
lines.english: The Guru Himself established the Eternal Throne of Truth, in Guru Raam Daas. ||6||
